name: Partnership Agreement
description: A contract between two or more partners establishing a business partnership, defining roles, profit sharing, and governance.

sections.title: Preamble
sections.content:
This Partnership Agreement ("Agreement") is entered into as of {{effective_date}} by and between:

{{partner_one_name}}, with an address at {{partner_one_address}} ("Partner One"), and

{{partner_two_name}}, with an address at {{partner_two_address}} ("Partner Two").

Partner One and Partner Two are collectively referred to as the "Partners."

sections.title: Formation and Name
sections.content: The Partners hereby form a general partnership under the name "{{partnership_name}}" (the "Partnership"). The Partnership shall conduct business under this name or such other names as the Partners may agree upon in writing.

sections.title: Purpose
Capital Contributions
Profit and Loss Sharing
sections.content:
The net profits and losses of the Partnership shall be allocated among the Partners in proportion to their ownership interests:

- {{partner_one_name}}: {{partner_one_ownership_percent}}%
- {{partner_two_name}}: {{partner_two_ownership_percent}}%

Distributions of profits shall be made at such times and in such amounts as the Partners may agree, but no less frequently than annually. The Partnership's fiscal year shall end on {{fiscal_year_end}}.

sections.title: Management and Authority
Partner Duties
sections.content: Each Partner shall devote such time and attention to the Partnership business as is reasonably necessary. Each Partner owes a fiduciary duty to the other Partners and to the Partnership, including duties of loyalty and care. No Partner shall engage in any business activity that directly competes with the Partnership without the written consent of the other Partners.

sections.title: Withdrawal and Dissolution
Dispute Resolution
sections.content: Any dispute arising out of or relating to this Agreement shall first be submitted to mediation. If mediation is unsuccessful, the dispute shall be resolved by binding arbitration in accordance with the rules of the American Arbitration Association. The costs of arbitration shall be shared equally by the Partners.

sections.title: Governing Law
sections.content: This Agreement shall be governed by and construed in accordance with the laws of {{governing_law_state}}, without regard to its conflict of laws principles.

sections.title: Signatures
sections.content:
IN WITNESS WHEREOF, the Partners have executed this Partnership Agreement as of the date first written above.

Partner One: {{partner_one_name}}
Signature: ___________________________
Date: ___________________________

Partner Two: {{partner_two_name}}
Signature: ___________________________
Date: ___________________________
